content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

The changes are well-structured and correct. All four query types are implemented as specified: (1) run_history now falls back to task_source lineage when journal lacks it, (2) show_project preserves fallback lineage when milestone metadata is missing, (3) bead_execution_history now errors cleanly for unknown beads against valid plans, and (4) list_tasks_for_milestone was refactored to use find_bead_plan_details directly. The inject_task_source_initial_details consolidation eliminates duplication between create_project and create_project_from_bead_context. Tests pass (241+794 all green), clippy is clean with -D warnings, fmt passes, and nix build succeeds. The origin serialization via serde_json::to_string + trim_matches is mildly unconventional but correct for snake_case enum variants. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
